title: rubus × pubicaulis
intro: Rubus × pubicaulis, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family, resulting from the cross between Rubus occidentalis and Rubus idaeus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × pubicaulis include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against certain diseases. Rubus × pubicaulis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as jams, jellies, teas, and supplements, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
